---
name: Add a resource
about: Suggest a new link or resource for the list
title: "Add: [Resource Name]"
labels: ["addition", "needs-review"]
---

**Resource name and URL**
<!-- Name and full URL -->

**Which section does it belong to?**
<!-- inference-providers / datasets-gdpr-safe / eu-ai-act-tooling / grants-compute / models / multilingual / research-labs / communities -->

**One-line description (your own words, not copy-pasted from the site)**
<!-- Max 120 characters -->

**License / openness** *(for datasets and models only)*
<!-- e.g. Apache 2.0, CC-BY-4.0, Open weights, Proprietary with free tier -->

**Why it belongs on this list (1–2 sentences)**
<!-- What makes it EU-relevant and useful for builders? -->

**Checklist**
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) and this resource meets the inclusion criteria
- [ ] The resource is currently active and accessible
- [ ] My description uses "resources for" language, not compliance claims
